name: gizmo-sandbox-bridge-simone
description: Cloudflare Worker bridge for Gizmo NXT skill script execution. Exposes the @cloudflare/sandbox HTTP API for the Gizmo iOS+macOS app, BYO Cloudflare account.

SANDBOX_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for bridge auth. Set to the same value as your Gizmo AI Gateway token (cf_api_token) so a single Keychain entry serves both surfaces. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32` if you prefer a separate token.

WARM_POOL_TARGET.description: Number of pre-warmed containers to keep ready (0 disables the warm pool — recommended for personal use to avoid surprise bills).

WARM_POOL_REFRESH_INTERVAL.description: Milliseconds between warm pool health checks (default: 10000).
